VenueId.description: The unique ID of the venue

Name.description: The full name of the venue

Address.description: The address where the venue is located

City.description: The city where the venue is located

Zip.description: The zip code of where the venue is located

Country.description: The country name of where the venue is located

Open.description: Indicates whether this venue is actively used

Opened.description: The year the venue opened (e.g. 1950; 1960; etc)

Capacity.description: The estimated seating capacity of the venue

Surface.description: The playing surface of the stadium. Possible values: Grass; Artificial

GeoLat.description: The geographic latitude coordinate of this venue

GeoLong.description: The geographic latitude coordinate of this venue
